displayTitle: Republic #52: The New Face of War, Part 2
synopsis: The Clone Wars kicks into high gear in this action issue! A Gungan settlement has been massacred, General Kenobi has been captured, and the Separatist's are planning to wipe out Naboo with a biological weapon! Only Anakin Skywalker and Alpha, a clone trooper specialist, can save the day--but that's only if they can get past Durge, Count Dooku's hired assassin who has a centuries-old grudge against the Jedi, and Commander Asajj Ventress, a mysterious Jedi with a dark past!
title: Republic #52: The New Face of War, Part 2
